verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The chimes of time ring out the news Another day is through, Someone slipped and fell Was that someone you, You may have longed for added strength Your courage to renew Do not be disheartened, For I have need for you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It is no secret what God can do, What he's done for others, He can do for you With arms wide open, He'll pardon you, It is no secret what God can do.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is no night for in his light, You'll never walk alone Always feel at home, Wherever you may roam, There is no power to conquer you When God is on your side, Just take him at his promise Don't run away and hide.
